tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be termed as the reserve bank of india (trade receivables discounting system) directions, 2026 and shall be effective immediately. tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Reserve Bank of India
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Reserve Bank of India'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Reserve Bank of India
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be Reserve Bank of India' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
